overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit commercial district at night, ascending a large outdoor staircase, and traversing an elevated walkway overlooking the street below. The scene features prominent digital billboards, futuristic architecture, and atmospheric lighting typical of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked commercial street with massive digital billboards

events.description: red vintage car drives past on the wet street, reflecting neon lights
approaching the entrance to the outdoor staircase structure

agents.ego_description: navigating through the neon-lit street, moving toward the staircase entrance while avoiding pedestrians

notable_agents.action: red vintage car driving along the wet street, passing through the intersection

entered.detail: massive curved digital screen displaying 'OIL' advertisement with vivid colors
rain-soaked road surface reflecting neon lights and building illumination
painted pedestrian crossing lines on the street
tall modern building with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a rain-soaked commercial street at night, surrounded by towering glass buildings and massive digital billboards. A red vintage car passes by on the wet asphalt as the character approaches a staircase entrance marked by prominent neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit outdoor staircase between commercial buildings

events.description: entering the covered stairway from the open street, ground surface changes to stairs
passing seated pedestrians on the right while continuing ascent

agents.ego_description: climbing the long flight of stairs illuminated by cyan neon strips, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow shirt descending the stairs with an umbrella

entered.detail: long concrete staircase with metal railings illuminated by cyan neon strips
large illuminated corporate signage spelling 'KENDACHI' in white letters
transparent safety barriers along the stair edge

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a long outdoor staircase illuminated by vibrant cyan neon strips, passing between towering commercial buildings. The 'KENDACHI' sign remains visible on the right as other pedestrians move up and down the stairs, and the street level disappears from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass walls overlooking the street

events.description: reaching the top of stairs and entering the upper covered walkway
pausing at the glass railing to look down at the street traffic below

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated corridor and pausing to observe the street from above the glass overlook

entered.detail: covered pedestrian bridge with reflective floor and neon tube lighting
large concrete planters containing tropical vegetation
transparent glass railing providing elevated view of street below
large vertical screen displaying animated character advertisement

segments.scene_description: Having reached the upper level, the character walks along a covered pedestrian walkway lined with potted plants and digital advertisements. The corridor features glass walls and neon lighting, ending at an overlook where the character pauses to gaze down at the traffic moving along the street far below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-soaked street level up into an elevated urban corridor overlooking a neon-lit metropolis. It begins by following a character through a commercial district of towering glass buildings and massive digital billboards, passing a red vintage car on the wet asphalt toward a neon-marked staircase. As the character ascends the long outdoor stairs, the street level disappears from view and the environment shifts to a narrow climb illuminated by vibrant cyan neon strips and the glow of a KENDACHI sign. The scene then opens into a covered pedestrian walkway lined with potted plants and digital advertisements, moving through a glass-walled corridor. Finally, the camera reaches an overlook where the character pauses to gaze down at the distant traffic flowing far below.
